title: astragalus pascuicola
intro: Astragalus pascuicola, also known as Saltbush milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is native to the western United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Astragalus pascuicola include immune system support, anti-fatigue effects, and potential anti-aging properties. Astragalus pascuicola can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
